calibration.calibration_note: With hazard_harm=0.02, avg episode ~182 steps (was ~18 with 0.5). Actual episode time higher.

items.title: SD-016 Path 1 div_weight sweep 0.0/1.0/2.0/5.0 (writepath=off, 4 arms x 3 seeds)
items.notes: Sweep of diversification weight at 1.0/2.0/5.0 (plus 0.0 baseline). All arms: writepath_mode=off, sd016_temperature_learnable=False. Tests whether stronger gradient pressure on key_proj/memory eventually breaks the attn_entropy uniform rail that EXQ-418e (div_weight=0.5) could not. C1 PASS requires at least one arm to break uniform rail in ALL seeds. supersedes EXQ-418e (weight-sweep follow-up). EXQ-418f=attention_probe, 418g=selectivity_4arm, 418h=env_entropy_precondition are all prior to this; 418i is the next letter.
